docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCURDY, CHARLES MCCURDY, MARIAN AS TO DEFENDANT CGU INSURANCE COMPANY GENERAL ACCIDENT INSURANCE COMPANY DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-26-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-23-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-27-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUN-18-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-18-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST JOHN M. FEDER, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-18-2002 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-05-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: DAVE DAVENPORT. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
$200 SANCTIONS PAID FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCURDY, CHARLES MCCURDY, MARIAN

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-09-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-26-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS & COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCURDY, CHARLES MCCURDY, MARIAN SERVED JUL-11-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CGU INSURANCE COMPANY GENERAL ACCIDENT INSURANCE COMPANY
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GENERAL ACCIDENT INSURANCE COMPANY

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-09-2002 CONTINUED TO OCT-15-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). SEP-09-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT CGU INSURANCE COMPANY
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR NOV-11-2002. OCT-15-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

STIPULATION FOR MEDIATION; REQUEST TO BE TAKEN OFF ARBITRATION HEARING LIST AND REQUEST FOR FURTHER STATUS HEARING AFTER MEDIATION PAID FILING FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT GENERAL ACCIDENT INSURANCE COMPANY

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE MEDIATION SET FOR JAN-08-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. CASE IS REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT

NOTICE OF MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON APR-04-2003 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 514. NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR APR-21-2003 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE IS REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
OBJECTION TO COURT'S NOTICE OF TIME & PLACE OF TRIAL & MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT GENERAL ACCIDENT INSURANCE COMPANY
